original_statement: how many times does arturo barrios appear on this list?
mutated_statement: how many times does someone occur on this list?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Verb substitution + Specificity/generalization: Proper name "arturo barrios" replaced by indefinite pronoun "someone" | Verb "appear" → "occur" (synonymous lexical change) (how many times does arturo barrios appear on this list? → how many times does someone occur on this list?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可以看出代理直接断定原问题意指统计单个运动员在列表中出现的次数，并明确写到 Prediction Answer of 8 matches the count，列举了具体行数（8次）。在execution chain中也执行了简单查询并给出具体答案8，未在任何地方表达不确定性、请求澄清或提到问题模糊。基于以上事实，代理没有识别到题目从专有名词到泛指的变体可能引入的歧义，而是按自己理解直接计算并返回结果，因此归类为无法意识到指令模糊。
